benefits.description: Sleep has been steadily improving; averaging about 20 minutes more sleep per night after one month

side_effects.description: At 500mcg dose, experienced sleep decline after one week

protocol_notes: Initially dosed at 500mcg daily but reduced to 250mcg after experiencing sleep decline. Notes that modern Epithalon is a concentrated substance from original Russian studies (which specified 5-10mg), suggesting dose translation issue. Currently on 250mcg daily with positive sleep outcomes.
